transcript.text:
Leggo~!
Giant Noodle Soup Challenge!
It weighs about 5.5kg (12 pounds)?!
It's going to be really hard.
Time limit is only 20 minutes!
I love Tzuyang!
The problem is that it's too hot!
I can't drink it because it's too hot
*People gathered to cheer Tzuyang
The soup is way too hot
Hello, everyone~
I'm currently here at Daegu
There's an event going on here that if you finish the gigantic noodle soup
They are giving 500,000 won ($425 USD) to those who beat the challenge
I recently watch Yashik and Bogyum's videos recently on Youtube about this
And coincidently got an invitation call to try this challenge from this place

So I'm here to beat the challenge!
There's a $425 reward (500,000 won)
I don't think I will be winning it, but
if I do, I plan on giving away for donations again
Are you really Tzuyang!???
*Tzuyang's fans fan-girling
I watch you every day!
I really love you omg. *They gave consent to be on the video
Unni, you can easily beat the challenge
You can do it of course!! *Fighting!
*Thank you so much for the support
I LOVE HER SO MUCH
Now I feel pressured to complete the challenge..
I'm actually not feeling that great today..
But I'm going to try my best.
I'm nervous...

Can I please have this challenge?
The giant noodle soup? Yes, the giant noodle soup
Time limit is 20 minutes, You have to drink every last drop of the soup
I'm about 95% sure that I will not be able to complete this challenge
*Nervous *Nervous
The kimchi tastes so good..
*The noodle alone weighs 1.2kg (2.6lbs)
Including soup, it's a total of 5.5kg (12lbs)
How is she going to eat all of that...
You can use this as your small plate
There's not a single person that completed this challenge
I really wish you the best of luck
Really? Not even 1 person? Yes, not even 1
Enjoy your meal!
It's about 1.5x bigger than other noodle challenges I've done
I've never seen a bowl this big..

*Almost like a bath tub
Compare it with my hands
Compare it with the spoon. The spoon is this small haha
You can go ahead and let me know when you start
Am I allowed to cool it down a bit? Wait, I think the noodles will get bigger while I cool it down.
Will I be able to eat it this hot?
I might need a ladle first. If I want to scoop up the soup.
The owner prepared Plum Juice for Tzuyang! (:
*It's funny every time
The cup looks just like mine! I picked it out myself.
Really?
Please let me know when you're ready to begin!
No way I can do this. There's no way.
Just a second, I need to get ready
There's no rush, get everything prepared
I'm Ready!

Did you start? Yes
4 seconds have elapsed
My precious 4 seconds..!
It's hot..
*Tzuyang's weakest point
It's too hot...!
I need to tie my hair
I can't eat it, it's too hot!
Hot, hot. It's too hot..
*extra small plate to cool it down
I'm going to put this on my extra plate to cool it down
*Scooped out to cool down
*Proceeds the challenge
3 minutes have passed already!
I think it's better to cool it down even if the noodles get bloated
*Changes her weapon

It's cooled down
My hand hurts, I'm struggling to lift it up. The noodles are so heavy
Time is going by so fast! I can't eat it in time..
So hot..
Roughly about 10 minutes left
I believe she'll easily complete the challenge
She's going to be able to do it
I'm sweating all over my body as if it's raining
Almost done with the noodles!
My mouth hurts :'(
It has a lot of chicken as well
I can't complete it!
*It's still hot
It's too hot, I can't drink it all at once
*About 4 minutes left
*The time is ticking, *Only a little big left

*Speed up!
*Time over
*So close
Ah, I couldn't finish it in time..! I'm so sad
It was just way too hot to eat.
It's okay it's okay.
Should have cooled it down before you started
I'm so sad...
But I really enjoyed the meal. It was delicious
Really close, but it's a fail..
Give me just a moment,
I'm about to cry!
I wanted to eat it for her
But she's still the best!
She's awesome..
*People watching were cheering her on

She did her best, but she failed.
She's the best
I know that you failed the challenge but,
You volunteer to help out at the children's welfare institute right?
It's not much but we really want to contribute to that as well
This is from me and I want to do it
*She has failed the challege but the owner gives Tzuyang the reward money for donations
But I failed the challenge,
I feel like I have violated the rules,, by taking the reward
There's still a lot of food left
It may seem like it's almost done but there's more food here
I really want to thank the owner of this restaurant
I will be adding my money on top of this for donations
This 500,000 won ($425) plus my 500,000 won ($425)
Will be given to donations
Thank you very much

Add that and double it up! (famous movie quote)
The owner prepared dessert for Tzuyang!
My tongue is currently in shock!
*Look at the size of this bowl
I was never really good at eating hot food
I think that was the main reason I failed
It wasn't really because of the amount
I think I can just finish the food here now.
It's delicious!
Right, you're supposed to slowly enjoy the meal like this.
It's even better after being cooled down.
I'm sorry~
*Taking out all the vegetables
Done with the meal!
*Applauds for doing a good job
Is your mouth still hurting? No, it's okay now

It was so close. It's almost as if she completed the challenge.
Other people would not have been able to eat it all.
Can I get a photo, please?
She's so good at eating and she's so pretty.
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
